identity.name: E1_AFFILIATE_MARKETING
identity.archetype: The Performance Pro (Archetype 2) x Swiss High-Contrast

headings.usage: Use for all H1-H3. Transform uppercase for H1. Tracking tight (-0.02em).

body.usage: Use for paragraphs, UI text. High legibility.

mono.usage: Use for stats, pricing numbers, and small labels/tags.

grid_systems.hero_split: grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-2 gap-12 items-center min-h-[80vh]

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90 rounded-none h-12 px-8 uppercase font-bold tracking-widest text-sm hover:-translate-y-1 transition-transform border-2 border-transparent
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border-2 border-primary text-primary hover:bg-primary hover:text-primary-foreground rounded-none h-12 px-8 uppercase font-bold tracking-widest text-sm transition-colors

cards.style: bg-card border border-border/50 rounded-none hover:border-primary/50 transition-colors duration-300 group relative overflow-hidden
cards.effect: Add a 'glare' effect on hover using pseudo-elements

inputs.style: bg-background border-b-2 border-border focus:border-primary rounded-none px-0 py-4 focus:ring-0 transition-colors font-mono placeholder:text-muted-foreground/50

visual_enhancers.noise_texture: url("data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg viewBox='0 0 200 200' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%3E%3Cfilter id='noiseFilter'%3E%3CfeTurbulence type='fractalNoise' baseFrequency='0.65' numOctaves='3' stitchTiles='stitch'/%3E%3C/filter%3E%3Crect width='100%25' height='100%25' filter='url(%23noiseFilter)' opacity='0.05'/%3E%3C/svg%3E")

do_not_use: Gradient text on dark backgrounds (Legibility issues)
must_do: Add hover states to ALL interactive elements

implementation_steps: 1. Setup ThemeProvider for Dark/Light mode toggle.
2. Configure Tailwind with 'Oswald' and 'Inter' fonts and the 'Acid Green' color palette.
3. Build the 'NoiseOverlay' component to apply the grain texture globally.
4. Create the 'Hero' section with the split layout and bold typography.
5. Build 'ProductCard' components using the 'Bento' grid layout.
6. Implement 'ContactForm' using Shadcn Form + SendGrid logic.
